summary: Executed backend pytest regression and focused UI smoke/integration checks for auth, revenue strategy trigger path, reports, and privacy controls. Public landing route is reachable, but authenticated and data-dependent flows are blocked by runtime backend dependency failure.

critical.issue: Returns 400 for valid payloads because Prisma cannot load better-sqlite3 native bindings in runtime (logged repeatedly as 'Could not locate the bindings file'). Route catches all errors and masks infrastructure failure as validation error.
Demo login fails with 401 due to DB access failure in auth credential lookup path (same Prisma better-sqlite3 binding problem).
Authenticated flows untestable end-to-end because account creation/login fail upstream; business-critical flows blocked.

minor.issue: Test fixtures default to localhost when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is missing; this diverges from required public-endpoint-only policy.

ui_bugs.issue: Next static CSS/JS/font chunk requests return 500, leaving pages mostly unstyled and potentially partially non-interactive.

integration_issues.issue: UI submits but remains on /register? or /login? due to backend failure. No successful session created.

integration_issues.flow: Weekly revenue trigger, mission logging, weekly/monthly reports, privacy export/delete
integration_issues.issue: Blocked because authentication and DB-dependent RPC routes fail before entering protected flows.

issues: Design system styles are not applied due to static chunk 500 responses; visual hierarchy and spacing degrade to browser defaults.

action_items: Fix runtime better-sqlite3 native binding resolution in the deployed container (install/rebuild correct binary for current Node/arch) so Prisma can connect.
Avoid broad catch-all masking in /rpc/register; return 500 for infrastructure errors and reserve 400 for real validation failures.
Restore Next static asset serving (500s on /_next/static/*) so CSS/JS/fonts load and UI behaves correctly.
Provide/configure required public URL env (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL equivalent) for test/runtime consistency; remove localhost fallback in tests if policy requires public endpoint only.
After infra fix, rerun authenticated regression tests and full UI journey (dashboard/revenue/logs/reports/settings privacy).
critical_code_review_comments: Over-broad exception handling in /rpc/register hides server/runtime errors as client validation errors, making RCA harder.
Auth and core RPC paths have hard dependency on Prisma startup health; no graceful health gate or dependency check exposed.
Repository still has multi-lockfile/root ambiguity from consolidation (warnings in runtime logs), increasing startup/config fragility.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest run completed: 28 total, 21 passed, 3 failed, 4 errors. Primary blocker is Prisma better-sqlite3 binding load failure from frontend runtime logs; auth and register blocked. UI automation confirmed landing/login/register pages render but static chunks return 500 and styling is broken. Re-test only after dependency/runtime fix.
rca of the issue: Repro: run pytest on /app/tests/*.py -> auth guard tests pass, authenticated/signup tests fail. Logs show repeated 'prisma:error Could not locate the bindings file ... better_sqlite3.node'. Because DB access fails, /rpc/register catch block returns 400 'Invalid input', and credentials auth returns 401. Also /_next/static/* chunk requests return 500 causing unstyled UI. Mitigation: rebuild/install architecture-compatible better-sqlite3 binary and ensure static build/dev serving is correctly configured after root consolidation; then rerun seed + auth flow tests.
mocked_api: No MOCKED APIs used in this test run.
